market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to a bright, modern and generously‑sized two‑bedroom apartment in the heart of the city. This entire‑home rental comfortably sleeps up to four guests, making it perfect for families, small groups, or business travelers seeking space and style. The open‑plan living area is flooded with natural light, showcasing contemporary décor and a fully equipped kitchen ready for any culinary adventure. Both bedrooms feature large windows and ample storage, ensuring a restful night’s sleep. 

At just £128.6 per night, this apartment is priced 27% below the city’s median nightly rate of £175, offering exceptional value without compromising comfort. Guests have already left a strong 4.48 rating from 97 reviews, praising the cleanliness, location, and overall experience. While you’re not yet a Superhost, the positive feedback demonstrates a solid foundation for growth. 

Current occupancy for the next 90 days sits at 17.4% (only 74 open nights), well under the market median of 28.3%, indicating significant upside potential. Whether you’re exploring nearby attractions, attending a conference, or simply unwinding after a day out, this apartment provides a convenient base with easy access to transport, dining, and entertainment. Book now to enjoy a spacious, well‑appointed home at a remarkable price.
top_amenity_gaps: Entertainment options (TV, streaming services, board games)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑resolution shot of the bright living area as the cover photo – it showcases the apartment’s size, natural light, and modern décor, immediately capturing guest interest.
key_diagnosis: Add high‑value amenities (outdoor, parking, entertainment) – these three categories are missing and could lift perceived value, helping convert the 17.4% occupancy (10.9 pp below market) into bookings.
Update the title to highlight the 27% price advantage – the current title scores 4/10 and omits the strongest differentiator, which could improve click‑through rates.

Create and upload a complete photo set covering living room, bedrooms, kitchen and bathroom – with unknown photo count, adding at least 8 well‑lit images can boost the image score from 3/10 and improve conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing is priced 27% below the city median yet only 17.4% occupied over the next 90 days—there’s huge upside to capture more bookings.
